title: MoreFood
description: 100+ new vanilla+ food items like new crops, fruits, cooked items, fast food, desserts, snacks, and dishes and more
body:
![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PokjWGJQ/images/12acc035ecb305f7c845b9860ffa85fde6d30472.png)
## MoreFood - A Delicious Addition to Minecraft!

- **🍫 100+ New Food Items**

- **🌾 New Crops**
 
- **🍎 New Fruits**

- **🍳 New Cooked Items**

- **🍟 New Fast Food**

- **🍰 New Desserts**

- **🍩 New Snacks**

- **🍲 New Dishes**

- **🧊 New Building Blocks**

- **🧂 New Villager**

- **🌴 Coconut Trees in Beach Biomes**


<details>
<summary>Info</summary>

  
* **🌾 Rice Seeds can be obtained by breaking grass**
* **🌽 Corn can be obtained by breaking tall grass**
* **🫐 Blueberries are found in Birch Forests and Meadow biomes, and can also be obtained by breaking ferns**
* **🍌 Bananas can be obtained by breaking Jungle leaves**
* **🥝 Kiwis can be obtained by breaking Mangrove leaves**
* **🥥 Coconuts can be obtained by breaking Coconut leaves**
* **💵 Villagers also trade new food items**
* **📦 Most loot chests contain new food items**
* **🧪 Coconut Smoothie cures Mining Fatigue, Hot chocolate cures Weakness**

---

* **🐾 Animal Foods:**
* 🐺 **Wolves:** Cooked Flesh, Meat Stew, Cooked Spider Eye, Cooked Tropical Fish, Sushi, Fish Stew, Cooked Pufferfish, Meat Skewer
* 🐱 **Cats:** Sushi, Fish Stew
* 🐔 **Chickens/Parrots:** Rice Seeds
* 🦜 **Parrots (Poisonous):** Sandwich Cookie, Honey Cookie
* 🦊 **Foxes:** Blueberries
* 🐫 **Camels:** Cactus Leaf
* 🐄 **Pigs/Cows/Goats/Sheep:** Corn
* 👻 **Happy Ghast:** Any Ice Cream

  
</details>

---
❗ Make sure to download [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) alongside this mod
Here’s your updated section with the recipe info added:
